1.title: Companion
1.explanation: Aipify's executive intelligence layer — briefings, priorities, and guidance grounded in your operational context.
1.workflow: Ask a question → Aipify gathers context → Presents insight with recommended next step.
1.value: Leadership clarity without chasing updates across disconnected tools.

2.title: Knowledge Center
2.explanation: Approved knowledge, playbooks, and onboarding paths — accessible to the right roles at the right time.
2.workflow: Question raised → Knowledge search → Approved answer with source context.
2.value: Institutional knowledge stays current, visible, and usable.

3.title: Operations Center
3.explanation: Day-to-day operational coordination — tasks, handoffs, and team visibility in one workspace.
3.workflow: Alert received → Review context → Assign or approve → Track to completion.
3.value: Teams move work forward with shared visibility and fewer manual follow-ups.

4.title: Trust Center
4.explanation: Transparency for permissions, audit trails, data ownership, and governance controls.
4.workflow: Sensitive action proposed → Policy check → Human approval → Audit logged.
4.value: Enterprise confidence that Aipify operates within approved boundaries.

5.title: Business Packs
5.explanation: Modular domain capabilities — activate only the operational packs your organization needs.
5.workflow: Select pack → Configure for your domain → Operate with domain-specific workflows.
5.value: Right-sized capability without unnecessary software sprawl.

6.title: Executive Center
6.explanation: Strategic visibility for leadership — revenue context, risks, approvals, and operational health.
6.workflow: Daily briefing prepared → Risks surfaced → Decisions prepared for review.
6.value: Executives see what matters and what to act on — not raw noise.

liveWorkflows.title: See how work flows through Aipify.

1.question: What changed this week?
1.answer: Three operational shifts need attention: support volume increased 12%, two approvals are overdue, and inventory for SKU-442 is below threshold. I recommend reviewing the support queue first — it affects customer response times today.

2.question: Show revenue risks.
2.answer: Two renewal conversations lack owner assignment, and one enterprise account shows declining engagement. I have prepared a summary with recommended owners and suggested follow-up timing for your review.

3.question: Prepare board report.
3.answer: I can prepare a draft board summary covering operational health, key risks, and strategic priorities from approved sources. Would you like me to include support metrics and approval backlog status?

4.question: What should I focus on today?
4.answer: Your highest-impact items: approve the vendor contract waiting since Monday, review the weekly operations briefing, and assign an owner to the overdue support escalation. Each includes context and estimated effort.

5.question: Which approvals need attention?
5.answer: Four approvals are pending: two support responses, one inventory reorder, and one policy exception. The inventory reorder is time-sensitive — stock falls below minimum in 48 hours if not approved.

bigger.a: Dozens of operational engines, not one feature. Support, finance, customers, projects, knowledge, partners, automation, and executive intelligence — connected.

safer.a: Human approval on sensitive actions, full audit logging, RBAC, tenant isolation, and explicit trust policies — designed for enterprise procurement.

trust.q: Why should an enterprise trust Aipify?

ownership.title: You own your data
ownership.body: Customer operational data belongs to the customer. Aipify owns the intelligence layer — metadata, patterns, and approved learning summaries only.

noSurveillance.title: No employee surveillance
noSurveillance.body: Aipify does not monitor employees, keystrokes, screens, private files, or browsing history. Presence indicators reflect system state — not individual surveillance.

collection.title: What we collect
collection.body: Account information, installation metadata, configuration, and anonymised operational metrics. We do not store raw email content, chat transcripts, or payment records in learning memory.

license.title: Software license
license.body: Aipify is proprietary software owned by Aipify Group AS. Customers receive a license to use the service — not ownership of the software.

use.title: Acceptable use
use.body: Use Aipify in compliance with applicable law and your organization's policies. Do not attempt to bypass tenant isolation or approval controls.

knowledgePage.title: Knowledge Center
knowledgePage.subtitle: Common questions about Aipify.
knowledgePage.faqIntro: Transparent answers about the product, trust, and enterprise readiness.

1.a: Aipify is a Business Operating System — an operational intelligence platform for support, knowledge, governance, workflows, and business visibility with human control built in.

2.a: No. Aipify is a Business Operating System — not a chatbot, helpdesk, CRM, or automation tool. Conversation is one surface; the product is operational coordination with governed workflows and audit trails.

3.a: No. Aipify augments people. It prepares drafts, organizes knowledge, and handles repeatable work within approved boundaries. Your team makes important decisions.

4.a: Aipify helps your business stay organized, respond faster, and work smarter — through support, knowledge, follow-up, operations, deliverables, trust controls, and explainable clarity.

5.a: No. Aipify is not employee surveillance software. It should not monitor screens, keystrokes, private files, or browsing history.

6.a: Yes. Aipify can generate reports, summaries, certificates, spreadsheets, presentations, and other business deliverables.

7.q: Can Aipify be used by larger companies?
7.a: Yes. Aipify is designed with multi-tenant architecture, roles, permissions, audit logs, SSO readiness, and enterprise deployment readiness.

8.q: How does Aipify become more useful over time?
8.a: Organizations can gradually delegate approved workflows to Aipify through explicit, reversible, and auditable trust policies.

earlySignup.title: Why Become a Growth Partner
paragraphs: Represent a world-class Business Operating System and build your own customer portfolio with recurring commissions.
Aipify provides the platform, certification, partner support, marketing resources, and commission infrastructure.
You focus on relationships and sales. Aipify handles platform delivery, subscriptions, support, and product development.

lines: Aipify Growth Partners build customer portfolios around Aipify products and services.
You focus on customers. Aipify handles platform delivery, subscriptions, support, infrastructure, and product development.

cards.title: Recurring commissions
cards.body: Earn commission from customers you bring to Aipify.

cards.title: Enterprise product
cards.body: Sell a serious Business Operating System for modern organizations.

cards.title: Full training provided
cards.body: Aipify provides training before you start selling.

cards.title: Certification included
cards.body: Complete certification and unlock active selling rights.

cards.title: Your own customer portfolio
cards.body: Build long-term customer relationships.

cards.title: Work independently
cards.body: Operate through your own business and grow at your own pace.

independentPartnership.title: Independent Business Partnership
independentPartnership.intro: Growth Partners operate independently while representing Aipify products and services.
partnerDecides: You decide which customers to approach.

steps.title: Register your business
steps.body: Complete the short registration with your business details. Your personal partner link is created automatically.

steps.title: Create your Growth Partner account
steps.body: Your account is created inside Aipify APP with partner ID, link, and QR code.

steps.title: Complete training
steps.body: Learn Aipify products, Business Packs, sales process, and customer onboarding.

steps.title: Pass certification
steps.body: Complete the Certified Aipify Sales Partner program before becoming an active seller.

steps.title: Start selling
steps.body: After certification, build your Aipify customer portfolio using your auto-attributed partner link.

requirements.title: Two requirements
items: You must operate through a registered business.
You must complete Aipify training and certification before active selling rights are granted.
requirements.copy: Valid business registration and completed certification are required. Aipify does not guarantee income — earnings depend on your activity and customer outcomes.

earnings.title: Build recurring revenue
earnings.copy: Aipify Growth Partners earn recurring commissions from qualified customers they bring to Aipify.
earnings.disclaimer: No guaranteed income. Earnings depend on your sales activity, customer retention, plan value, commission settings, and active partner status. Commission rules are visible inside the Growth Partner dashboard.

tiers.title: 10 customers
tiers.body: Build your first recurring commission base.

tiers.title: 50+ customers
tiers.body: Build a full-time sales business around Aipify.

training.title: We train you before you sell
training.certificationNote: Certification applies only to Aipify product and sales training. It does not imply public, government, or independent authorization.

growthPartners.footerNote: Aipify Group AS · Bergen. Norway. For the world.

signup.title: Start in under 3 minutes
signup.businessRegistrationHelper: Enter your official business registration identifier.
signup.checkboxRegisteredBusiness: I confirm that I operate through a registered business.
signup.checkboxCertification: I understand that I must complete Aipify training and certification before becoming an active seller.
signup.checkboxInfoAccurate: I confirm that the information I provide is correct.
signup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
signup.errorPasswordMismatch: Passwords must match and be at least 8 characters.
signup.legalNote: By registering, you confirm that you operate independently, are responsible for your own tax and reporting obligations, and agree to represent Aipify Group AS professionally.

growthPartnerTermsPage.title: Growth Partner Terms & Conditions
growthPartnerTermsPage.updated: Aipify Group AS · Bergen. Norway. For the world.
growthPartnerTermsPage.intro: These terms govern the independent Growth Partner relationship with Aipify Group AS. By registering as a Growth Partner, you agree to these terms.

independent.title: 1. Independent Business Relationship
independent.body: Growth Partners operate as independent business operators. Growth Partners are not employees of Aipify Group AS.

tax.title: 2. Tax Responsibility
tax.body: Growth Partners are responsible for their own taxes, VAT, accounting, local reporting obligations, and registration with relevant tax authorities in their own country or jurisdiction.

accurateInfo.title: 3. Accurate Information
accurateInfo.body: Growth Partner confirms that registration information is correct, complete, and up to date.

brand.title: 4. Brand Representation
brand.body: Growth Partners represent Aipify products and services and must follow Aipify Group AS brand and conduct guidelines.

certification.title: 5. Certification Requirement
certification.body: Growth Partners must complete required training and certification before active selling rights are granted. Certification applies to Aipify product and sales training only.

commission.title: 6. Commission Program
commission.body: Commissions are calculated according to Aipify Group AS partner rules. Commission structures may be updated by Aipify Group AS according to published partner terms.

ownership.title: 7. Customer Ownership
ownership.body: All customers belong to Aipify Platform. Growth Partners receive attribution and commission only. Growth Partners do not own customers.

compliance.title: 8. Compliance
compliance.body: Growth Partners must comply with applicable local laws and regulations.

suspension.title: 9. Account Suspension
suspension.body: Aipify Group AS may suspend or terminate partner accounts for fraud, abuse, misrepresentation, brand misuse, policy violations, or illegal activity.

noGuarantee.title: 10. No Income Guarantee
noGuarantee.body: Aipify does not guarantee income. Earnings depend on partner activity, customer purchases, retention, commission rules, and active partner status.

meta.title: Pricing — Aipify Business Operating System
meta.description: Simple pricing built to grow with you. Choose the operating model that fits your organization — upgrade naturally as you scale.

hero.headline: Simple pricing. Built to grow with you.
hero.subheadline: Start with what you need today. Expand when your organization is ready.
hero.supporting: Every plan includes the Aipify Business Operating System foundation.

cards.title: No long-term contracts
cards.body: Monthly or annual billing — choose what fits your organization.

cards.title: Upgrade instantly
cards.body: Access updates immediately after payment. No waiting, no manual unlock.

cards.title: Built to scale
cards.body: Start small and grow naturally — the same platform at every stage.

cards.title: Human control
cards.body: Automation never removes governance. Approvals and audit remain central.

businessPacks.title: Business Packs
businessPacks.copy: Business Packs can be activated as your organization grows — operational modules tailored to your industry and workflows.

upgradePath.headline: Start small. Grow naturally.
upgradePath.copy: Organizations can upgrade at any time without migrating to a different platform.

cards.title: SSO
cards.body: Microsoft Entra ID, Google Workspace, and Okta integration readiness.

cards.title: Hybrid Deployment
cards.body: Cloud and controlled hybrid options for regulated environments.

cards.title: On-Premise
cards.body: Deployment models for organizations with strict data residency requirements.

cards.title: Dedicated Success Team
cards.body: Custom Business Packs and enterprise rollout with a dedicated success manager.

items.question: Can I upgrade later?
items.answer: Yes. Upgrade at any time — permissions and features activate immediately after payment.

items.question: Do I lose data when upgrading?
items.answer: No. Your workspace, settings, and operational data remain intact.

items.question: Can I add Business Packs later?
items.answer: Yes. Activate Business Packs as your operational scope grows.

items.question: Do I need Enterprise immediately?
items.answer: No. Most organizations start with Starter or Business and grow into Professional or Enterprise.

items.question: Can Aipify grow with my company?
items.answer: Yes. Aipify is designed as a long-term operating model — not a tool you outgrow.

contactSales.headline: Not sure which package fits your organization?
contactSales.subheadline: Our team can help identify the right starting point.

billingArchitecture.title: Billing and upgrades
billingArchitecture.accounting: Fiken integration for Norwegian accounting workflows.
billingArchitecture.upgradeNote: Aipify upgrades activate immediately after payment — no manual intervention, no waiting.

pricingPage.finalPrinciple: Pricing should feel like selecting the right operating model for your organization — not buying another software subscription.

meta.title: Why Aipify — A Business Operating System Built for Outcomes
meta.description: Software tells you what happened. Aipify helps you decide what happens next. Discover why organizations choose Aipify as their long-term operating model.

hero.headline: Software tells you what happened. Aipify helps you decide what happens next.
hero.subheadline: A Business Operating System built to help organizations operate, grow, and evolve.
hero.supporting: Aipify combines operations, knowledge, governance, intelligence, automation, and companion technology into one unified platform.

problem.headline: Organizations are drowning in tools.
problem.supporting: Most organizations spend more time switching between systems than actually improving the business.

cards.title: Companion
cards.body: A digital companion that remembers, follows up, and helps — not a disposable chat interface.

cards.title: Knowledge
cards.body: Your organizational memory — approved sources, institutional context, and continuity.

cards.title: Operations
cards.body: Workflows, approvals, tasks, and execution in one coherent layer.

cards.title: Governance
cards.body: Enterprise-grade controls, audit visibility, and human approval at every sensitive step.

cards.title: Intelligence
cards.body: Insights, risks, opportunities, and recommendations — with context and next steps.

cards.title: Growth
cards.body: Business Packs, automation, and expansion tools that activate as you scale.

builtForHumans.headline: Technology should support people.
builtForHumans.supporting: Aipify is designed around human control, transparency, and trust. People decide. Aipify prepares, informs, and assists.

builtToGrow.headline: Start where you are. Grow when you are ready.
builtToGrow.supporting: Most customers start small and expand over time — on the same platform, without migration.

cards.title: Governance
cards.body: Policies, approvals, and explainability built into the operating model.

cards.title: Audit Logging
cards.body: Immutable records for actions, configuration, and trust events.

cards.title: Role-Based Access
cards.body: Permissions mapped to your organization — least privilege by design.

cards.title: Compliance
cards.body: Enterprise readiness for procurement, security review, and governance teams.

cards.title: Approvals
cards.body: Sensitive work requires explicit human approval — never silent execution.

cards.title: Security
cards.body: Privacy by design — metadata first, customer ownership of operational data.

cards.title: Trust Center
cards.body: Transparent licensing, data ownership, and how Aipify works.

vision.headline: A platform that grows with your organization.
vision.supporting: Aipify is designed to support organizations through every stage — the platform should never need to be replaced.

norway.headline: Built in Norway.
norway.copy: Aipify Group AS builds Business Operating Systems with Norwegian values and global ambitions — calm, trustworthy, and built for the long term.
norway.footerQuote: Technology should become more human as it becomes more powerful.

items.question: How long is the demo?
items.answer: Typically 45–60 minutes — tailored to your priorities, not a fixed script.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
items.answer: No. We focus on operational outcomes. Technical stakeholders are welcome to join.

items.question: Can I invite colleagues?
items.answer: Yes. We encourage the right decision-makers and day-to-day operators to attend.

items.question: Can we discuss custom Business Packs?
items.answer: Yes. We review industry packs and discuss fit for your organization.

items.question: Can Aipify integrate with our systems?
items.answer: We discuss install-first integration during implementation planning — read-only first, expand with approval.

companion.headline: Meet Aipify Companion
companion.copy: During your demonstration you will see how Companion helps organizations remember, coordinate, follow up, and operate more effectively — with human control at every sensitive step.

bookDemoPage.finalPrinciple: The goal is not to collect leads. The goal is to begin relationships — understood before they ever become customers.
